175 E1000A_WNDR_RISK_CD E1000A_WNDR_RISK_CD E1000A Wander Risk Impact CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies whether the resident's wandering places them at significant risk for getting to a potentially dangerous situation. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No

^=Blank(skip pattern)
